event.name: MAF 2026
event.dates: Fri Sep 25 4–8 PM + Sat Sep 26 11 AM–8 PM

gifts.name: Festival Foundation
gifts.tagline: Insurance, permits, and infrastructure every festival needs.
gifts.description: CGL insurance, CSD permits, TFF coordinator, ops tents, organic marketing, and contingency — embedded in the MVP cap.
benefits: Foundation sponsor recognition on website + email

gifts.name: Festival Stage
gifts.tagline: The stage where Mid-Autumn Festival comes alive.
gifts.description: 30×30 stage tent, portable PA + mic, and two lion dances — the cultural heart of Saturday at Derr-Okamoto.

gifts.name: Safe Festival
gifts.tagline: A safe place for children to run with lanterns at dusk.
gifts.description: Security coverage Fri 4–8 PM and Sat festival hours.
benefits: Safety sponsor recognition on website + email

gifts.name: Festival Amenities
gifts.tagline: Families stay longer when comfort is covered.
gifts.description: Restrooms, ADA unit, and hand-wash stations for Fri night market and Sat festival.
benefits: Named amenity sponsor on website + digital sponsor slide

gifts.name: Lantern Procession
gifts.tagline: The walk that closes Mid-Autumn Festival — light moving through the park.
gifts.description: Music-driven lantern walk — children with LED lanterns, route staging, and the moment families photograph.

gifts.name: Children's Show
gifts.tagline: Mid-Autumn Festival is for the kids — this is their day on stage.
gifts.description: Full Sat schedule — MC, singers, dancers, magic, clown, storytelling.

gifts.name: Honor our Elders
gifts.tagline: Grandparents watch the procession in comfort — an MAF value made visible.
gifts.description: A restful zone with shade tent, seating, and elder tea hospitality.

gifts.name: Light Up The Park
gifts.tagline: Trees, stage, and night market lit for MAF — the park glows at dusk.
gifts.description: Functional power and light for stage + night market, plus tree uplights, string lights, and stage flowers — Mid-Autumn Festival atmosphere before the procession.

lineItems.label: Stage zone — light tower + 25 KVA generator
Tree uplights, string lights, stage flowers

gifts.name: Spread the Word
gifts.tagline: Spread the Word presented by [Sponsor] — reach families who have not found us yet.
gifts.description: Paid Meta / Instagram and boosted posts — media sponsorship, not a petty-cash ask.

gifts.name: Festival Stage+
gifts.tagline: Saturday stage at full production quality.
gifts.description: Upgrade from playlist-only to concert-quality outdoor sound and basic stage lighting — requires Festival Stage in Core ops.

gifts.name: Safe Festival+
gifts.description: Additional security beyond the Safe Festival baseline — requires Safe Festival in Core ops.

gifts.name: Festival Amenities+
gifts.description: Extra restroom capacity for peak Sat hours — requires Festival Amenities in Core ops.

gifts.name: Additional amount
gifts.tagline: Top up your package toward the next tier.
gifts.description: Add any dollar amount on top of your selected gifts — for example, $100 on top of Festival Stage ($2,400) to reach Gold ($2,500+) and unlock sponsor booth spot. Does not fund a named registry feature.
benefits: Counts toward Gold tier sponsorship minimum

gifts.name: Sponsor booth spot
gifts.tagline: On-site sponsor activation — bring your own tent.
gifts.description: 10×10 sponsor activation footprint at the festival (not a vendor booth application). You provide the tent; cPALSs assigns your on-site location and recognizes you on the website.

gifts.name: Tent rental
gifts.tagline: Optional — we rent the 10×10 for your sponsor booth.
gifts.description: Capitol Tent City 10×10 tent + weights for Fri night market and Sat festival. Add alongside sponsor booth spot if you prefer not to bring your own tent.
benefits: Delivery + pickup handled by festival ops
Same 10×10 spec as sponsor booth footprint
